name: Banana Nut Cheesecake II
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine crumbs and margarine; press onto bottom of a 9-inch springform pan.
2. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
3. Combine cream cheese, sugar, and banana in a bowl. Mix on medium speed with an electric mixer until well blended.
4. Add eggs one at a time, mixing well after each addition. Stir in walnuts.
5. Pour mixture over the crust.
6. Bake at 350°F for 40 minutes.
7. Loosen cake from rim of pan; cool before removing rim of pan.
8. Melt chocolate pieces and margarine with water over low heat, stirring until smooth.
9. Drizzle melted chocolate over cheesecake.
10. Chill.
